scope: P2-8 admin correction finalization transaction safety.
certifyingReason: The finalization transaction tests and repo-supported validation passed, but the exact requested Vitest command with --runInBand fails before test execution because Vitest 4.1.5 does not support that option.

automatedEvidence.requirement: simulated failure after status update rolls back or records pending/degraded, not false finalized
automatedEvidence.evidence: Training insert failure after status update rejects and records failure audit metadata without success audit.

automatedEvidence.requirement: successful finalization writes correction status, training material, and audit metadata consistently
automatedEvidence.evidence: Status update, training insert, and success audit are recorded under the transaction scope.

automatedEvidence.requirement: retry after failed finalization is idempotent
automatedEvidence.evidence: Success-audit failure rejects with failure audit; retry finalizes correction and training consistently.

commands.summary: Existing violation correction regression checks passed.

commands.command: pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit tests/api --runInBand
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit tests/api

commands.summary: Build, golden path, unit suite, deterministic ingestion report, credit parser regression, tradeline internal checks, and violation correction regression passed.
